NAVAREA XIX 110/24

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  241830 UTC AUG 24
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 72-26.9N 020-12.9E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 65-47.5N 007-31.2E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
 65-44.3N 007-39.4E SCARABEO 8
 65-34.1N 007-12.2E TRANSOCEAN NORGE

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　108/24
